items.name: GERMANIER Self-Embrace Burst Dress
items.description:
GERMANIER : Tomorrow Was Inspiration — Sculpted Self-Embrace 🌑⚡🩶
Designer: Kevin Germanier
3D Collaboration: Ram2isflat

A wearable confrontation with the unknown. Kevin Germanier joins emerging Hong Kong artist Ram2isflat to create a haunting 3D muse head and torso — a figure caught between past and future, embracing itself while shielding its face. This pose captures the unease of moving toward what we cannot see: a future that pulls us forward yet drags at our shadows. 🌫️🖤

The piece expresses vulnerability, tension, and the human instinct to protect oneself when the world feels blurry. But in that darkness lies urgency — a desire to break through, to seize the future even when uncertainty blinds us. This digital sculpture transforms that emotional weight into form, turning introspection into armor and anxiety into art. ⚡🫂

Features:
🩶 3D muse torso + head collaboration with Ram2isflat
🌑 Symbolic self-embrace capturing unease + vulnerability
⚡ Futuristic Germanier aesthetic

items.name: chain 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .

items.name: Chic Paddington White Leather Gold Lock Bag
items.description:
ALL COLORS:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=24&CreatorName=Pryse&salesTypeFilter=1

It was on a rainy Tuesday in a Paris Internet café when Chloe stumbled upon it—a vintage gem tucked away on Vestiaire Collective, calling her name like a long-lost friend. With its effortlessly slouchy silhouette and buttery pristine leather, the bag had that lived-in luxury only time could craft.

A bold gold padlock anchored the front, gleaming softly like a secret waiting to be told. Not just an accessory, but a statement—equal parts relaxed and refined. The bag’s weight felt reassuring on her arm, like carrying a little piece of history with every step.

Soft, structured, and unapologetically niche—this piece isn’t just worn. It’s lived in.
